description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a large, ultra-high-definition display, as indicated by the 'VOVO 2021 UHD' branding on the screen. The TV is mounted on a sleek, rectangular glass or acrylic stand with rounded corners and four cylindrical legs, giving it a contemporary look. The front view showcases a vivid landscape image, while the back is plain black with a small port visible on the right side. The television has a very thin profile, with minimal bezels around the screen, and the stand appears transparent with metallic or plastic supports. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons or controls on the front or sides. The materials suggest a combination of glass or acrylic for the stand, plastic and metal for the TV body, and electronic components inside.
description: A large, ultra-thin flat-screen television on a transparent stand with a minimalist, modern design and very thin bezels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vivid UHD display, thin bezels, and transparent stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the TV and the layered construction of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel and a visible port on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the thinness and the stand's structure.
attribute_bezel_design: Ultra-thin, black, matte plastic bezel with minimal thickness and no visible ornamentation.
